scope: locate real website Git worktree and create safe handoff plan; no source edits, no deploy, no Stripe calls, no admin runtime calls, no DB writes

candidateWebsiteRepoPaths.notes: This is the only workspace found with the current public/assets/js/app.js and public/index.html tree. It contains the v1.0.127 website fixes but is not a Git worktree.
Backend Git repo only; it does not contain the public website source tree.
Desktop app workspace, not the website repo.
Older update-site folder with root index/latest assets, not the current public website tree.

blocker: No actual website Git worktree containing public/assets/js/app.js or public/index.html was found locally. The only matching public website files are in a non-Git sibling workspace.
safeHandoffPlan: Do not deploy from the non-Git sibling workspace.
Locate or clone the real website repository that deploys fimamacro.com and contains the public website tree.
Copy/apply the already-prepared v1.0.127 website changes from the sibling public workspace into that Git worktree.
Re-run the Priority 2B/2C static checks and narrow browser QA inside the website Git worktree.
Commit and push from the real website Git worktree only after the diff confirms public website files are tracked there.
nextRecommendedStep: Provide the real website repo path or clone URL, or confirm permission to clone the website repository, then apply the v1.0.127 public website fixes there and commit/push from that Git worktree.
